summary: Fixed the PLAYBOOK.md documentation contract tests in test/worktree.test.mjs by splitting the OR-loose cleanup test into two separate independent assertions (one for 'git worktree remove --force', one for 'git worktree prune') and adding two new tests verifying the Inspect subsection commands ('git -C .team/worktrees/<slug> log' and 'git -C .team/worktrees/<slug> status'). Captured test output to test-output.txt as a verifiable artifact. All 566 tests pass.
